doc: Semantic correspondences the SDK tags cannot express: how an input-only config field is realized as a different output-only state field. Hand-authored (reviewed as code), separate from the generated schema so `make oci.generate` stays idempotent. observe applies these to complete effective_config so it is comparable to intent.

derivations.doc: OCI accepts isIpv6Enabled at create but reads it back as the ipv6CidrBlocks list — enabled iff that list is non-empty. Without this, effective_config would omit isIpv6Enabled and a reconciler would see false drift against an intent that sets it.
